Compliance.description: SARB PA; emerged from curatorship 2016; current licensing solid but historical issues weigh on score.

Customer Satisfaction.description: HelloPeter score low; mainly complaints on loan products; savings customers more positive.

Product Value.description: High savings rates (up to 11%); but loan rates high; limited transactional banking.

Innovation.description: MyWORLD account; basic digital tools; limited fintech innovation vs peers.

Customer Support.description: Call centre exists; complaints of difficulty with disputes, slow resolution.

Accessibility & Security.description: Limited branch network; app basic; security adequate; limited vs Big 4 accessibility.

pricing.name: Pricing
pricing.cost: Pricing: MyWORLD R4.95/mo; savings accounts fee-free; loan rates high
